creator: metivier.roland@chlorophyt.us
text:
I confirm that this happens to me on one of the older retro computers I've rebuilt with spare parts.

Still hangs the installer (13.0-RELEASE) with the following specs when the ZFS module is loaded/used:

- 4GB DDR2 may cause "physmem" to wrap indeed.
- Pentium 4 at 3.6GHz requires me to use a 32-bit i386 kernel.
- Two 250GB WD Caviar SEs in a mirror might require ZFS.
